definition: Describing the deathless dimension associated with release and nibbāna.
notes: The project prefers deathless because it is the most established and least distorting English choice for this term in doctrinal contexts. Immortal is discouraged because it suggests an enduring personal being rather than the quenching-oriented framework of the canon.

context_rules.context: In most doctrinal and practical contexts
In explanatory prose clarifying the privative structure
context_rules.notes: Acceptable alternate when the English line benefits from directness.
